event.name: 2026 Sterling Grove PGA Championship Invitational
event.status: Setup in progress. Teams, A/B PGA picks, and Calcutta bids are pending.

saturday.label: Saturday Shamble
saturday.description: Both players tee off, select the best drive, play their own ball in, and both balls count.

sunday.label: Sunday Best Ball
sunday.description: Each player plays his own ball and the lower team score counts on each hole.

pga.label: A/B PGA Players
pga.description: Each team drafts one A player and one B player after the cut. Round 3 and Round 4 scores count.
